## Bug Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Enable Gestro
3. Show gesture '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Console Logs
Open DevTools (F12) → Console tab → paste any [Gesture] errors here.

```
paste logs here
```

## Environment
- OS: (e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11)
- Chrome Version: (e.g. 124.0.0)
- Gestro Version: (e.g. 2.0.0)
- Webcam: (e.g. built-in MacBook camera)
- Lighting conditions: (good / low / bright)

## Additional Context
Any other information that might help.
